channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Telegram ban in India sparks a rush to VPNs, rival apps
item.description: Telegram argues India should block specific content, not an entire platform used by millions.

item.title: 'We've seen an increase in Blu-ray orders of 10,000%': I spoke to a Blu-ray and vinyl manufacturer about their Blu-ray sales and it's given me even more hope for physical media's survival
item.description: While home physical media was on the decline, a talk with a vinyl and Blu-ray manufacturer gave me hope for the future.

item.title: I found a hidden ChatGPT setting that changes how hard the AI thinks — and the difference surprised me
item.description: The iOS app version of ChatGPT has a great hidden feature for choosing how intelligent you want your answer to be.

item.title: Source: Elastic agrees to buy CRV-backed DeductiveAI for up to $85M
item.description: DeductiveAI, a startup that uses AI to catch and resolve bugs in software, was founded just three years ago.

item.title: This tiny AMD PC just ran a massive 397B AI Model that required a server room full of GPUs a year ago
item.description: Longsys shows how far edge AI computing has come by running a mammoth 397-billion-parameter model on a customized AMD Ryzen AI Max+ 395-based PC with 128GB of RAM.

item.title: 100 days after the Iran war started — Tehran-backed group breaches California Water Service but claims they 'chose not to disrupt water access'
item.description: Iranian-linked group Handala breached California Water Service, leaking 5GB of customer data and exposing critical GPS infrastructure across seven districts.
